reconciliation.scope: Release arc: v0.15.0 (derived on read from the last reachable tag) through evaluated_commit (intended release v0.15.1). The v0.15.0..evaluated_commit arc is docs/comment-only and carries zero consumer-facing behavioral change: the five commits 94afbc0 (research field-report evidence preservation), 4a61db0 (permconfig/decision docs + 21 lines of `//` comments in internal/permconfig/tables.go, with the permission-templates source and rendered mirror co-changed in lockstep as a correctly-synced doc update), 753e831 (decision-memo correction), 72a7acb (P3 context-pruning behavioral spec), and cddac9c5 (vh-solara research disposition addendum) changed no Go logic, constant, inventory, or template-rendered contract — the only Go file in the arc is internal/permconfig/tables.go (comment-only), and drift=0 and doctor=HEALTHY were verified at the evaluated commit with a fresh binary. The vh-solara orchestration items referenced by the research memos in this arc are explicit non-goals for this docs-only release and are future-slice backlog. Single-commit manifest ceremony: this manifest commit M is an immediate child of evaluated_commit P (=HEAD^ at authoring); at HEAD=M the DEFER handshake invariant requires HEAD^ == evaluated_commit == manifest_parent_commit AND tree(HEAD^) == evaluated_tree AND HEAD^..HEAD to change ONLY this manifest path. The readiness artifact .vh-agent-harness/release-readiness-pass.json is intentionally left UNCOMMITTED for v0.15.1 (owned by the readiness agent, overwritten on re-run); the manifest-only diff constraint is satisfied by the committed manifest change alone, since the handshake reads committed trees, not the worktree. Release mode is manifest-authority-only; the authorized release wrapper and CI recheck always read this committed manifest. release_base.value is advisory (derive-on-read via gitLatestTag excluding --release-version); kind stays operator-attested. records[] dispositions are operator-attested and unchanged by the releaser's SHA recompute.

records.summary: P1-LINEAGE-002 deferred coverage (F6/F7) — conditional on a future prune phase.
records.reason: Not part of the current release. Retained for audit with unsupported legacy trigger metadata (the source card's trigger grammar uses a '||' separator, a directory operand, and a non-predicate feature: term, which the strict release-mode predicate parser rejects). Re-evaluate only when a prune phase is pursued or renderstate/seam is touched for deletion logic. The canonical no+disclose+invalid disposition lets the release proceed while disclosing the conditional follow-up and its invalid metadata state.
